elements.title: lang::report_page_043_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id,
       kbi_c.fullname                                                     AS course,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       kbi_c.timecreated                                                  AS created,
       kbi_c.idnumber,
       kbi_c.enablecompletion,
       kbi_c.visible,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE
                   WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                   ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0)                         AS grade,
       MAX(l.timespend)                                               AS timespend,
       MAX(l.visits)                                                  AS visits,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_cc.userid)                                      AS completed,
       COUNT(DISTINCT uc.userid)                                      AS learners,
       (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM mdl_course_modules WHERE visible = 1
                                                   AND course = kbi_c.id) AS modules,
       (SELECT name FROM mdl_course_categories WHERE id = kbi_c.category) AS category
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_e.courseid, kbi_ue.userid
                  FROM mdl_enrol kbi_e
                         JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id AND kbi_ue.status = 0
                         JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50 AND kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_e.courseid
                         JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                           ON kbi_ra.userid = kbi_ue.userid AND kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
                  WHERE kbi_e.courseid > 0
                    AND kbi_e.status = 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_e.courseid, kbi_ue.userid) uc ON uc.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc ON kbi_cc.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cc.userid = uc.userid AND kbi_cc.timecompleted > 0
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course' AND kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.userid = uc.userid AND kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT courseid, SUM(timespend) AS timespend, SUM(visits) AS visits
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking
                  WHERE id > 0
                  GROUP BY courseid) l ON l.courseid = kbi_c.id
WHERE kbi_c.id > 1
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_c.id
